Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sometimes adding milk and sugar is nice. But I usually take it black, of course.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}If you feel like meeting up for coffee again, just let me know.[n]{f 1 1}
